name: Coconut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups coconut milk or coconut cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cornstarch, and baking powder. Set aside.
2. Beat the margarine with the sugar until smooth. Add the egg yolks and beat well.
3. Mix in the dry ingredients alternately with the coconut milk, stirring after each addition.
4. Fold in the grated coconut until just incorporated.
5. Whisk the egg whites until they form soft peaks. Gently fold the whites into the batter.
6. Grease a 9-inch cake pan and sprinkle with a little flour. Pour the batter into the pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes, then reduce the heat to 250°F (120°C) and bake an additional 20-25 minutes until set.
8. Allow the cake to cool slightly on a wire rack.
9. Unmold the cake and serve warm with sauce drizzled over it.
Sauce:
1 can condensed milk (sweetened)
1 cup coconut cream
Bring to a boil, then pour over the warm cake while still hot. Sprinkle with grated coconut before serving.
